data.title: Ritten receives $35M Series B investment led by Five Elms Capital for AI system in behavioral health.
data.description: In Philadelphia on December 11, 2025, Ritten, a prominent AI-based system for behavioral health professionals, revealed a successful Series B funding round. The funding totaled $35 million USD and was primarily backed by Five Elms Capital, along with contributions from previous investors including Threshold Ventures, 8VC, and Bienville.

data.title: Mastercard and TerraPay team up to expand digital wallet acceptance worldwide, leveraging TerraPay's Xend platform.
data.description: TerraPay has announced a collaboration with Mastercard in Dubai, UAE on Dec. 11, 2025 to expedite market entry and launch through its payment interoperability platform Xend. This partnership will enable faster transactions for Mastercard wallet partners, including mobile money wallets. TerraPay, a global money transfer company, aims to enhance its services by leveraging Mastercard's network. This agreement is expected to significantly boost the efficiency and speed of global payments.

data.title: Intensity Therapeutics to present posters at San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium on INVINCIBLE-4 study. INT230-6 cohort shows 50% fewer grade 3+ Adverse Events.
data.description: The latest findings from Poster PS5-08-16 reveal initial insights from the INVINCIBLE-4 Study, a live Presurgical Phase 2 Clinical Trial focused on Triple Negative Breast Cancer. The results indicate promising safety aspects, with a notable 50% reduction in grade 3 or higher Adverse Events noted within the INT230-6 cohort compared to previous observations.

data.title: byNordic Acquisition Corp extends business combination deadline by $17,470; 5th of up to 12 extensions allowed until Aug 12, 2026.
data.description: In New York, NY, byNordic Acquisition Corporation ("BYNO") has extended the deadline for completing a business combination by depositing $17,470 into its trust account. This extends the deadline from December 12, 2025, to January 12, 2026, which is the fifth extension allowed out of a total of twelve. The company can continue extending the deadline by one month each time until August 12, 2026, or until the completion of its initial business combination. This decision was made by the company's board of directors under the August 8, 2025, amendment to the Amended and Restated Certificate of Incorporation.

data.title: 85,000 students create future "Farm to Table" cities, seeking expert judges. Nonprofit DiscoverE calls for volunteers.
data.description: More than 85,000 students are participating in a competition to design the cities of the future centered around the "Farm to Table" concept. To evaluate the submissions, industry experts are being sought to join engineers on the judging panel. The announcement was made in Washington on December 11, 2025, by DiscoverE. This nonprofit organization is famous for its initiatives and is calling for volunteer participation this year.

data.title: Dow Jones futures rise, tech stocks recover, Oracle plunges on AI spending concerns. GE Vernova, Palantir make gains in Fed-led rally.
data.description: In a market shift on Wednesday, futures rebounded and technology stocks trimmed losses, with concerns over Oracle's drop due to fears regarding artificial intelligence spending. Amid a rally led by the Federal Reserve, GE Vernova and Palantir showed positive momentum. The Dow Jones futures demonstrated an increase, offsetting the tech slump, as highlighted by the dip in Oracle's stock due to AI investment uncertainties.

data.title: Loews Corp (NYSE: L) responds to Delaware Supreme Court ruling on 2018 acquisition of minority partner interests.
data.description: Loews Corporation (NYSE: L) revealed that the Delaware Supreme Court ruling regarding the 2018 acquisition of minority limited partner interests in Boardwalk Pipelines subsidiary has been issued. The Court's decision marks a significant development in the litigation process.

data.title: 2026 Toyota Tundra now available at Ammaar's Toyota Vacaville in California. Bold, tow-ready full-size pickup.
data.description: Explore the 2026 Toyota Tundra, a robust, tow-ready, and highly capable full-size pickup now available at Ammaar's Toyota Vacaville in Vacaville, California. The latest model offers advanced features for shoppers seeking a powerful truck experience. This announcement was made in Vacaville, California on December 11, 2025. This marks a significant advancement in the realm of full-size trucks, offering an exciting new option for customers.

data.title: CMS announced NDA acceptance of innovative drug Y-3 for acute ischemic stroke treatment in China on 12/11/25.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on December 11, 2025, China Medical System Holdings Limited revealed that the New Drug Application (NDA) for their Class 1 Innovative Drug Y-3 for Injection has been accepted by the National Medical Products Administration of China. The proposed English generic name for Y-3 for Injection is Loberamisal for Injection. This product, serving as a brain cytoprotectant, is specifically designed for the treatment of acute ischemic stroke.

data.title: Marshall University partners with InScribe to provide digital community platform for online learners.
data.description: In a recent development, InScribe Education has introduced its digital community platform to support online undergraduate students, aiding in their engagement and connection. The partnership, unveiled on December 11, 2025, between InScribe and Marshall University aims to enhance student support. This initiative will benefit a significant number of online students in Denver and Huntington, W.Va.

data.title: New Era Energy & Digital (NUAI) updates on progress at TCDC AI Data Center, a 50/50 JV with Sharon AI, Inc. in Texas.
data.description: In Midland, Texas, New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. (Nasdaq: NUAI) shared updates on its Texas Critical Data Centers (“TCDC”) project. The company, known for its digital infrastructure and power assets in the Permian Basin, highlighted advancements in engineering, commercial endeavors, and regulatory processes at TCDC. This venture, a 50/50 partnership with Sharon AI, Inc., is New Era's primary AI data center and power initiative. The progress signifies a key development for the company in establishing its presence and operations in the region.

data.title: 2026 Honda Ridgeline now available at Steele Honda in St. John's, Newfoundland. Exciting news for pickup enthusiasts.
data.description: The 2026 Honda Ridgeline, known for its durability, versatility, and adventure capabilities, is now available for exploration at Steele Honda in St. John's, Newfoundland. This announcement was made in St. John's, NL on December 11, 2025. Interested shoppers can now discover the latest model which offers a range of features designed for tough terrains and exciting adventures.
